concrete_change: After a completed no-VE rerun, keep `USE_VALUE_EMBEDDINGS = False`, set `DEPTH = 10`, and lower `ASPECT_RATIO` to 48 so the saved novelty budget becomes extra plain capacity.
emergent_thought: A genuine synthesis only matters if the clean no-VE antithesis survives contact with the harness; until then, deeper-no-VE remains the concrete third option waiting behind this unresolved opposition.
